blockers.description: CR-01 Critical: server/storage.js hardcodes data/cards.json — tests cannot isolate to a test file, all test writes hit production data
blockers.workaround: Run /gsd-code-review-fix 1 to auto-fix before Phase 2 builds on storage layer

decisions.decision: lowdb 7.0.1 + steno for atomic JSON writes
decisions.rationale: Pinned version, verified in research, serialises concurrent writes via temp-rename
Absolute path regardless of server start location — never relative, never user-supplied

decisions.decision: Startup guard: corrupt cards.json → backup to .bak → reset → reinit
decisions.rationale: Crash-safe startup without losing evidence of corruption

next_action: Run /gsd-code-review-fix 1 (optional but recommended), then /gsd-discuss-phase 2 to gather context for the REST API phase
context_notes: Phase 1 fully verified (5/5), all 4 CARD-04 tests GREEN, human checkpoint approved. Code review found 1 critical (test isolation) and 3 warnings — all advisory, do not block Phase 2 work but should be fixed early.
